Title: Check if CloudWatch has allowed cross-account sharing.
Description: CloudWatch doesn't allow cross-account sharing.

Recommendation.Text: Grant usage permission on a per-resource basis to enforce least privilege and Zero Trust principles.

Title: Check if CloudWatch log groups are protected by AWS KMS.
Description: Log Group RDSOSMetrics does not have AWS KMS keys associated.

RelatedRequirements: NIST-800-53-Revision-5 au_9_3 cp_9_d sc_8_3 sc_8_4 sc_13_a sc_2

Recommendation.Text: Associate KMS Key with Cloudwatch log group.

Title: Check if secrets exists in CloudWatch logs.
Description: No secrets found in RDSOSMetrics log group.

Recommendation.Text: It is recommended that sensitive information is not logged to CloudWatch logs. Alternatively, sensitive data may be masked using a protection policy

Types: Software and Configuration Checks/AWS Security Best Practices
Title: Ensure that CloudWatch Log Groups are not publicly accessible
Description: Log Group RDSOSMetrics is not publicly accessible.

Recommendation.Text: Ensure that CloudWatch Log Groups are not publicly accessible. Review and remove any resource policies that allow public access (Principal: '*') to log groups.

Title: Check if CloudWatch Log Groups have a retention policy of specific days.
Description: Log Group RDSOSMetrics has less than 365 days retention period (30 days).

RelatedRequirements: NIST-800-53-Revision-5 ac_16_b au_6_3 au_6_4 au_6_6 au_6_9 au_1

Recommendation.Text: Add Log Retention policy of specific days to log groups. This will persist logs and traces for a long time.

Title: Ensure AWS Config is enabled in all regions.
Description: AWS Config recorder 872515266548 is disabled.

RelatedRequirements: NIST-CSF-1.1 cm_2 am_1 ra_5 sc_4 ip_12

Recommendation.Text: It is recommended to enable AWS Config in all regions.

Title: Security Groups created by EC2 Launch Wizard.
Description: Security group default (sg-05eac625c3a31c5b5) was not created using the EC2 Launch Wizard.

Recommendation.Text: Apply Zero Trust approach. Implement a process to scan and remediate security groups created by the EC2 Wizard. Recommended best practices is to use an authorized security group.

Title: Find security groups with more than 50 ingress or egress rules.
Description: Security group default (sg-05eac625c3a31c5b5) has 1 inbound rules and 1 outbound rules.

Recommendation.Text: Use a Zero Trust approach. Narrow ingress traffic as much as possible. Consider north-south as well as east-west traffic.

Title: Ensure IAM AWS-Managed policies that allow full "*:*" administrative privileges are not attached
Description: AWS policy AutoScalingServiceRolePolicy is attached but does not allow '*:*' administrative privileges.

RelatedRequirements: NIST-800-53-Revision-5 ac_2_1 ac_2_6 ac_2_i_2 ac_3 ac_3_3 ac_3_
FedRamp-Moderate-Revision-4 ac-2-1 ac-2-f ac-2-j ac-3 ac-5-c ac
NIST-800-53-Revision-4 ac_2 ac_3 ac_5 ac_6 sc_2

Recommendation.Text: It is more secure to start with a minimum set of permissions and grant additional permissions as necessary, rather than starting with permissions that are too lenient and then trying to tighten them later. List policies an analyze if permissions are the least possible to conduct business activities.

Title: Check if there are SAML Providers then STS can be used
Description: No SAML Providers found.

Recommendation.Text: Enable SAML provider and use temporary credentials. You can use temporary security credentials to make programmatic requests for AWS resources using the AWS CLI or AWS API (using the AWS SDKs ). The temporary credentials provide the same permissions that you have with use long-term security credentials such as IAM user credentials. In case of not having SAML provider capabilities prevent usage of long-lived credentials.

Title: Ensure IAM password policy expires passwords within 90 days or less
Description: Password expiration is not set.

Recommendation.Text: Ensure Password expiration period (in days): is set to 90 or less.

Title: Ensure IAM password policy require at least one lowercase letter
Description: IAM password policy does not require at least one lowercase letter.

Recommendation.Text: Ensure "Requires at least one lowercase letter" is checked under "Password Policy".

Title: Ensure IAM password policy requires minimum length of 14 or greater
Description: IAM password policy does not require minimum length of 14 characters.

Title: Ensure IAM Roles do not have AdministratorAccess policy attached
Description: IAM Role ExternalAuditRole does not have AdministratorAccess policy.

Recommendation.Text: Apply the principle of least privilege. Instead of AdministratorAccess, assign only the permissions necessary for specific roles and tasks. Create custom IAM policies with minimal permissions based on the principle of least privilege.

Title: Ensure IAM Roles do not have AdministratorAccess policy attached
Description: IAM Role gautham-act-role does not have AdministratorAccess policy.

Recommendation.Text: Apply the principle of least privilege. Instead of AdministratorAccess, assign only the permissions necessary for specific roles and tasks. Create custom IAM policies with minimal permissions based on the principle of least privilege.

Title: Ensure IAM Roles do not have ReadOnlyAccess access for external AWS accounts
Description: IAM Role ExternalAuditRole does not have ReadOnlyAccess policy.

Recommendation.Text: Remove the AWS-managed ReadOnlyAccess policy from all roles that have a trust policy, including third-party cloud accounts, or remove third-party cloud accounts from the trust policy of all roles that need the ReadOnlyAccess policy.

Title: Ensure IAM Roles do not have ReadOnlyAccess access for external AWS accounts
Description: IAM Role gautham-act-role has read-only access but is not cross account.

Recommendation.Text: Remove the AWS-managed ReadOnlyAccess policy from all roles that have a trust policy, including third-party cloud accounts, or remove third-party cloud accounts from the trust policy of all roles that need the ReadOnlyAccess policy.

Title: Ensure a Security Audit role has been created to conduct security audits
Description: SecurityAudit policy is not attached to any role.

Recommendation.Text: Create an IAM role for conduct security audits with AWS.

Title: Ensure a support role has been created to manage incidents with AWS Support
Description: AWS Support Access policy is not attached to any role.

Recommendation.Text: Create an IAM role for managing incidents with AWS.

Title: Ensure there are VPCs in more than one region
Description: VPCs found only in one region.

Recommendation.Text: Ensure there are VPCs in more than one region
